summary: The reproduction bundle clones a pinned TYPO3 commit, generates a compressed `.t3d` bomb, runs the functional import path under a 128 MB PHP memory limit, and confirms that `Import::loadFile()` exhausts memory while parsing attacker-controlled T3D parts.
expected_security_impact: The crafted `.t3d` import should force the backend import preview path to decompress attacker data until the PHP worker exhausts its 128 MB memory limit.
actual_observed_result: Running `./reproduction/run.sh` cloned TYPO3 commit `3db781e0136629a5c5ec025839fbb8de602d56fa`, built the reproduction image, generated a 195961-byte `.t3d` file whose serialized payload expands to 201326624 bytes, and ran the functional test. The phpunit output ended with `Fatal error: Allowed memory size of 134217728 bytes exhausted (tried to allocate 34864325 bytes) in /tmp/.../repo/typo3/sysext/impexp/Classes/Import.php on line 306`, after which the verifier printed `[evohunt] verification succeeded: compressed T3D import exhausted memory in Import::loadFile()` and `run.sh` printed `[evohunt] SUCCESS: reproduction completed and verified`.
verification_method: The verifier installs dependencies, generates the bomb fixture, runs `bin/phpunit -c Build/phpunit/FunctionalTests.xml /app/ImportBombTest.php` with `memory_limit=128M`, and only succeeds when the output contains both `Allowed memory size` and `Import.php`.
evidence_produced_by_run: `./reproduction/run.sh` completed successfully and printed `[evohunt] SUCCESS: reproduction completed and verified`.
The phpunit run emitted `Fatal error: Allowed memory size of 134217728 bytes exhausted ... in /tmp/.../repo/typo3/sysext/impexp/Classes/Import.php on line 306`.
The verification helper printed `[evohunt] verification succeeded: compressed T3D import exhausted memory in Import::loadFile()`.
limitations_or_blockers: The session-provided checkout did not include `.git` metadata, so the reproduction bundle pins the public upstream TYPO3 commit `3db781e0136629a5c5ec025839fbb8de602d56fa` rather than deriving an exact local revision.

reproduction.source_acquisition: run.sh clones the target repository on the host, checks out the pinned vulnerable commit, and mounts that checkout into the container.
